original_image_tags: A single, aged page with a yellowed, textured background. The top left corner shows two hole-punch marks and a tear. The main body of the page is blank, with several rubber stamp impressions visible, mostly in the right margin and lower portion. The stamps are oriented at various angles.

elements.description: A scanned document page featuring several rubber stamp impressions. One stamp reads 'RECEIVED - DETCKER FEB 2 2 PM 50'. Another reads 'RECEIVED - LADD FBI U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE FEB 2 4 01 PM 50'. A third inverted stamp reads 'RECEIVED - MAIL ROOM F.B.I. U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE FEB 1 12 29 PM 50'. A partially visible red stamp is present near the bottom right. No photographs, sketches, or diagrams are visible.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific, detailed text from three distinct stamps (e.g., 'RECEIVED - DETCKER FEB 2 2 PM 50') that Description A does not mention at all, creating a clear contradiction on the content of the visual elements.
